verses.latin_vulgate: Exaudi, Deus, deprecationem meam ;  intende orationi meæ.
verses.king_james: Hear my cry, O God; attend unto my prayer.

verses.latin_vulgate: A finibus terræ ad te clamavi, dum anxiaretur cor meum ;  in petra exaltasti me.  Deduxisti me,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִקְצֵ֤ה הָאָ֨רֶץ ׀ אֵלֶ֣יךָ אֶ֭קְרָא בַּעֲטֹ֣ף לִבִּ֑י בְּצוּר־יָר֖וּם מִמֶּ֣נִּי תַנְחֵֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: From the end of the earth will I cry unto thee, when my heart is overwhelmed: lead me to the rock that is higher than I.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia factus es spes mea :  turris fortitudinis a facie inimici.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־הָיִ֣יתָ מַחְסֶ֣ה לִ֑י מִגְדַּל־עֹ֝֗ז מִפְּנֵ֥י אוֹיֵֽב׃
verses.king_james: For thou hast been a shelter for me, and a strong tower from the enemy.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inhabitabo in tabernaculo tuo in sæcula ;  protegar in velamento alarum tuarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָג֣וּרָה בְ֭אׇהׇלְךָ עוֹלָמִ֑ים אֶ֥חֱסֶ֨ה בְסֵ֖תֶר כְּנָפֶ֣יךָ סֶּֽלָה׃
verses.king_james: I will abide in thy tabernacle for ever: I will trust in the covert of thy wings. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam tu, Deus meus, exaudisti orationem meam ;  dedisti hæreditatem timentibus nomen tuum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־אַתָּ֣ה אֱ֭לֹהִים שָׁמַ֣עְתָּ לִנְדָרָ֑י נָתַ֥תָּ יְ֝רֻשַּׁ֗ת יִרְאֵ֥י שְׁמֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: For thou, O God, hast heard my vows: thou hast given me the heritage of those that fear thy name.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dies super dies regis adjicies ;  annos ejus usque in diem generationis et generationis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יָמִ֣ים עַל־יְמֵי־מֶ֣לֶךְ תּוֹסִ֑יף שְׁ֝נוֹתָ֗יו כְּמוֹ־דֹ֥ר וָדֹֽר׃
verses.king_james: Thou wilt prolong the king’s life: and his years as many generations.

verses.latin_vulgate: Permanet in æternum in conspectu Dei :  misericordiam et veritatem ejus quis requiret ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֵשֵׁ֣ב ע֭וֹלָם לִפְנֵ֣י אֱלֹהִ֑ים חֶ֥סֶד וֶ֝אֱמֶ֗ת מַ֣ן יִנְצְרֻֽהוּ׃
verses.king_james: He shall abide before God for ever: O prepare mercy and truth, which may preserve him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sic psalmum dicam nomini tuo in sæculum sæculi,  ut reddam vota mea de die in diem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֵּ֤ן אֲזַמְּרָ֣ה שִׁמְךָ֣ לָעַ֑ד לְֽשַׁלְּמִ֥י נְ֝דָרַ֗י י֣וֹם ׀ יֽוֹם׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: So will I sing praise unto thy name for ever, that I may daily perform my vows.
